untranslatable_reason: Flag formation pattern detection requires visual/geometric analysis (identifying consolidation boundaries, flag top/bottom, pole height measurement, and projection calculations). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators without pattern recognition logic. Entry requires explicit flag pattern identification and measure rule calculation (distance from flag top to trend start, projected from flag lowest low) which are not available as indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using uptrend confirmation (ADX > 25 indicates strong trending) and price above SMA_20 (confirms uptrend). Stop loss of 0.15 (15%) represents the 'formation high' stop mentioned in exit conditions. Exit uses trend reversal (price closes below SMA_20). Actual flag pattern recognition would require custom pattern detection not available in standard indicators. The measure rule target calculation cannot be automated without pattern geometry inputs.
